leadText: The Quiet Mint (Japanese: れいせいミント Quiet Mint) is an item introduced in Generation VIII. It is one of the types of mints that change the effect of a Pokémon's Nature.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If used from the Bag , it changes the effect of a Pokémon's Nature on its stats to that of the Quiet Nature, increasing its Special Attack stat and decreasing its Speed stat.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods Sw Sh Battle Tower (50 BP ) Sw Sh IA Hidden recurring item ( Soothing Wetlands ) Sw Sh CT Hidden recurring item ( Giant's Bed ) BD SP Battle Park (50 BP ) LA Farm (mint harvest) S V Area Zero Chansey Supply (after earning 6 Gym Badges ) Academy Ace Tournament Tera Raid Battles (5★, 6★) S V TM Ogre Oustin' S V ID Polar Biome ZA Rouge Sector 1 , Rouge Sector 6

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA When a Pokémon smells this mint, its Sp. Atk will grow more easily, but its Speed will grow more slowly. S V ZA Having a Pokémon smell this mint can make its Sp. Atk stat grow stronger. However, its Speed stat may suffer.
